creator: ecki@zusammenkunft.net
text:
I just spun up a Freebsd 10.1-RELEASE with your official AMIs and repeatet the test: when the download TGZ file is a  zero byte file portsnap will barf with "EBADF":

# : >  8a253c01b933fc0c6991437095d68061aae8aa5ae54999a8946631220012780a.tgz
# chmod a+w  8a253c01b933fc0c6991437095d68061aae8aa5ae54999a8946631220012780a.tgz
# portsnap -s isc.portsnap.freebsd.org fetch
Looking up isc.portsnap.freebsd.org mirrors... none found.
Fetching snapshot tag from isc.portsnap.freebsd.org... done.
Fetching snapshot metadata... done.
Fetching snapshot generated at Mon Mar  2 00:00:18 UTC 2015:
8a253c01b933fc0c6991437095d68061aae8aa5ae54999  0% of   71 MB    0  Bps 00m00s
fetch: http://isc.portsnap.freebsd.org/s/8a253c01b933fc0c6991437095d68061aae8aa5ae54999a8946631220012780a.tgz: Bad file descriptor
fetch: 8a253c01b933fc0c6991437095d68061aae8aa5ae54999a8946631220012780a.tgz: Bad file descriptor

So at least the part with the not recovering from a 0-byte file is still existing.

drwxr-xr-x   3 root  wheel     1024 Mar  2 20:45 .
drwxr-xr-x  10 root  wheel      512 Mar  2 20:30 ..
-rw-rw-rw-   1 root  wheel        0 Mar  2 00:19 .fetch.IKc0nO.8a253c01b933fc0c6991437095d68061aae8aa5ae54999a8946631220012780a.tgz
-rw-r--r--   1 root  wheel        0 Mar  2 00:19 .fetch.PQqYQb.8a253c01b933fc0c6991437095d68061aae8aa5ae54999a8946631220012780a.tgz
-rw-rw-rw-   1 root  wheel        0 Mar  2 00:19 .fetch.RCmC4E.8a253c01b933fc0c6991437095d68061aae8aa5ae54999a8946631220012780a.tgz
-rw-rw-rw-   1 root  wheel        0 Mar  2 20:42 8a253c01b933fc0c6991437095d68061aae8aa5ae54999a8946631220012780a.tgz
-rw-r--r--   1 root  wheel  2130680 Mar  2 20:36 INDEX
drwxr-xr-x   2 root  wheel  2120192 Mar  2 20:36 files
-rw-r--r--   1 root  wheel      451 Mar  2 20:33 pub.ssl
-rw-r--r--   1 root  wheel        0 Mar  2 20:45 serverlist_full
-rw-r--r--   1 root  wheel        0 Mar  2 20:45 serverlist_tried
-rw-r--r--   1 root  wheel      604 Mar  2 20:33 tINDEX
-rw-r--r--   1 root  wheel      604 Mar  2 00:19 tINDEX.new
-rw-r--r--   1 root  wheel       85 Mar  2 20:45 tag.new
